member.name: T:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair
member.summary: Represents an RSA key pair usable for ADB authentication.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair.Create
member.summary: Creates a new 2048-bit RSA ADB key pair.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair.ExportPrivateKeyPem
member.summary: Exports the private key in PKCS#8 PEM format.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair.CreateSelfSignedCertificate
member.summary: Creates a self-signed X.509 certificate for ADB TLS authentication.
member.returns: A self-signed certificate with the ADB RSA private key.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair.ExportAdbPublicKey(System.String)
member.summary: Exports the Android-specific ADB public key payload.
member.returns: A null-terminated ADB public key payload.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyStore
member.summary: Loads and creates local ADB host keys.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyStore.LoadOrCreateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads an existing key or creates a new key at the specified path.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbRsaAuthenticator
member.summary: ADB authenticator backed by a single RSA key pair.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbRsaAuthenticator.#ctor(AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair,System.String)
member.summary: ADB authenticator backed by a single RSA key pair.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.IAdbAuthenticator
member.summary: Supplies ADB authentication signatures and public keys.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.IAdbAuthenticator.SignTokenAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The token sent by the device.
member.returns: The signature bytes, or when no key is available.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.IAdbAuthenticator.GetPublicKeyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the public key payload to send to an Android device.
member.returns: The null-terminated public key payload, or when no key is available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.IAdbTlsAuthenticator
member.summary: Supplies client certificates for ADB TLS transports.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.IAdbTlsAuthenticator.GetClientCertificateAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the client certificate used for ADB TLS handshakes.
member.returns: The client certificate, or when no TLS credential is available.
